svg.content:
<mxGraphModel dx="1200" dy="800" grid="0" page="1" pageWidth="1400" pageHeight="850"><root><mxCell id="0" /><mxCell id="1" parent="0" /><mxCell id="customer" value="Customer
Web / Mobile" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#08427B;strokeColor=#073B6F;fontColor=#ffffff;fontStyle=1;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="40" y="60" width="150" height="60" as="geometry" /></mxCell><mxCell id="apigw" value="API Gateway
Validates Cognito JWTs" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#438DD5;strokeColor=#2E6CA4;fontColor=#ffffff;fontStyle=1;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="40" y="230" width="160" height="70" as="geometry" /></mxCell><mxCell id="alb" value="ALB
Path-based routing" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#438DD5;strokeColor=#2E6CA4;fontColor=#ffffff;fontStyle=1;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="40" y="390" width="160" height="70" as="geometry" /></mxCell><mxCell id="cognito" value="Amazon Cognito
JWT issuer" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#777777;strokeColor=#555555;fontColor=#ffffff;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="40" y="560" width="160" height="60" as="geometry" /></mxCell><mxCell id="users" value="Users Service
Fastify (Node.js)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#438DD5;strokeColor=#2E6CA4;fontColor=#ffffff;fontStyle=1;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="300" y="120" width="180" height="65" as="geometry" /></mxCell><mxCell id="orders" value="Orders Service
.NET Core 10 Minimal APIs" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#438DD5;strokeColor=#2E6CA4;fontColor=#ffffff;fontStyle=1;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="300" y="300" width="180" height="65" as="geometry" /></mxCell><mxCell id="tracking" value="Tracking Service
FastAPI (Python 3.12)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#438DD5;strokeColor=#2E6CA4;fontColor=#ffffff;fontStyle=1;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="300" y="480" width="180" height="65" as="geometry" /></mxCell><mxCell id="dbu" value="Aurora
PostgreSQL" style="shape=cylinder3;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#3949AB;strokeColor=#283593;fontColor=#ffffff;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="580" y="115" width="90" height="75" as="geometry" /></mxCell><mxCell id="dbo" value="Aurora
MySQL" style="shape=cylinder3;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#3949AB;strokeColor=#283593;fontColor=#ffffff;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="580" y="295" width="90" height="75" as="geometry" /></mxCell><mxCell id="dbt" value="Aurora
MySQL" style="shape=cylinder3;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#3949AB;strokeColor=#283593;fontColor=#ffffff;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="580" y="475" width="90" height="75" as="geometry" /></mxCell><mxCell id="sqs" value="SQS
domain events" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#C2185B;strokeColor=#880E4F;fontColor=#ffffff;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="770" y="200" width="140" height="60" as="geometry" /></mxCell><mxCell id="lambda" value="Events Pipeline
Lambda (Node.js, CQRS)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#D84315;strokeColor=#BF360C;fontColor=#ffffff;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="990" y="200" width="180" height="60" as="geometry" /></mxCell><mxCell id="docdb" value="DocumentDB
event store" style="shape=cylinder3;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#00838F;strokeColor=#005662;fontColor=#ffffff;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="1250" y="195" width="100" height="75" as="geometry" /></mxCell><mxCell id="param" value="Parameter Store
Secrets" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#777777;strokeColor=#555555;fontColor=#ffffff;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="770" y="470" width="140" height="60" as="geometry" /></mxCell><mxCell id="signoz" value="SigNoz
Observability" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#777777;strokeColor=#555555;fontColor=#ffffff;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="990" y="470" width="150" height="60" as="geometry" /></mxCell><mxCell id="c1" value="HTTPS" style="strokeColor=#08427B;fontColor=#08427B;" edge="1" parent="1" source="customer" target="apigw"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /></mxCell><mxCell id="c3" value="Validates" style="strokeColor=#555555;fontColor=#444444;" edge="1" parent="1" source="apigw" target="cognito"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /></mxCell><mxCell id="c4" value="Forwards" style="strokeColor=#2E6CA4;fontColor=#2E6CA4;" edge="1" parent="1" source="apigw" target="alb"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /></mxCell><mxCell id="c5" value="/users/*" style="strokeColor=#2E6CA4;fontColor=#2E6CA4;" edge="1" parent="1" source="alb" target="users"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /></mxCell><mxCell id="c6" value="/orders/*" style="strokeColor=#283593;fontColor=#283593;" edge="1" parent="1" source="users" target="dbu"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /></mxCell><mxCell id="c8b" value="SQL" style="strokeColor=#283593;fontColor=#283593;" edge="1" parent="1" source="orders" target="dbo"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /></mxCell><mxCell id="c8c" value="SQL" style="dashed=1;strokeColor=#2E7D32;fontColor=#1B5E20;" edge="1" parent="1" source="orders" target="tracking"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /></mxCell><mxCell id="c10" value="emit" style="strokeColor=#C2185B;fontColor=#880E4F;" edge="1" parent="1" source="users" target="sqs"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /></mxCell><mxCell id="c11" value="emit" style="strokeColor=#C2185B;fontColor=#880E4F;" edge="1" parent="1" source="orders" target="sqs"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /></mxCell><mxCell id="c12" value="triggers" style="strokeColor=#D84315;fontColor=#BF360C;" edge="1" parent="1" source="sqs" target="lambda"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /></mxCell><mxCell id="c13" value="persists" style="strokeColor=#00838F;fontColor=#005662;" edge="1" parent="1" source="lambda" target="docdb"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /></mxCell></root></mxGraphModel>
